name: calendar-heatmap
title: Calendar Heatmap
author: Parable
description: A GitHub-style contributions heatmap, hand-rolled as SVG with no charting deps: weeks-as-columns day-grid colored by a 5-bucket violet intensity ramp, month/weekday labels, and a hover- or arrow-key-driven tooltip announced via aria-live. Cells pop in with a diagonal (col+row) stagger that is dropped under prefers-reduced-motion, where every cell renders fully visible.
